intro.title: Play 1000 Wordle puzzles with the same guesses.
paragraphs: Kilordle turns the familiar five-letter word puzzle into a large multi-board challenge. Each guess is checked against every active hidden word.
Solved words disappear from the remaining count, and the board keeps showing a focused sample of the puzzles still in progress.

sections.title: How to Play
items: Enter a valid five-letter word using your keyboard or the on-screen keys.
Press Enter or GO to submit the guess to every active puzzle.
Green letters are correct and in the right position. Yellow letters are in the word but in another position.
Keep guessing until the remaining count reaches zero.

sections.title: Strategy Tips
items: Start with words that reveal common vowels and frequent consonants.
Watch the remaining boards for repeated patterns instead of solving only one board at a time.
Use later guesses to clean up groups of words that share similar letter positions.

sections.title: FAQ
items: The game runs in your browser and the puzzle board is rendered by the original React app.
The page content around the game is generated into the HTML during the build.
The main game is available at the root URL: /.
